docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE WAS $85.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIU, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT PAINT STUDIO SF
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE WAS $85.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIU, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT BAREMAN, NATHAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $207.00 SERVED JUN-03-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAREMAN, NATHAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $207.00 SERVED JUN-03-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAINT STUDIO SF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RYAN SIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS NATHAN BAREMAN AND NATHAN BAREMAN DBA PAINT STUDIO SF ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT AGREED TO AMEND HIS COMPLAINT DURING HEARING DATE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIU, RYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAREMAN, NATHAN NATHAN BAREMAN DBA PAINT STUDIO SF $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,625.00, MR. BAREMAN AGREED TO MR. SUI'S REQUEST TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE NATHAN BAREMAN DBA PAINT STUDIO SF. MR. BAREMAN REPRESENTED HE WAS A LICENSED CONTRACTOR BUT ADMITTED HIS LICENSE WAS SUSPENDED AT THE TIME OF THE JOB. B & P & 7031 (B) ENTITLED THE PLAINTIFF TO RECEIVED THE $11,000 HE PAID TO MR. BAREMAN & PAINT STUDIO S.F. ALSO, MR. BAREMAN & PAINT STUDIO SF.DID NOT COMPLETE THE WORK HE AGREED TO DO FOR MR. SUI. MR SUI IS ALSO ENTITLED TO $2000.00FOR THE COST OF THE SCAFFOLD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 07/02/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SIU, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT BAREMAN, NATHAN PAINT STUDIO SF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 06/26/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER)
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 06/0252025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER)
